autoAssign.success: The attending physician has been successfully assigned.

alert.title: What does this section involve?
alert.description:
- Every healthcare provider listed here has access to the contents of this prescription.
- When an organization is listed, it takes responsibility for the prescription and assigns it internally to a healthcare provider. Once assigned, the healthcare provider also appears in this list.
- The presence of a date indicates that the healthcare provider has already performed at least one care activity related to this prescription.

unavailable.message:
The PSS (Prescription Search Support) service is currently unavailable.
You are currently unable to view the medical imaging recommendations.
Please try again later.
